title: vaxtract: schema-validated extraction of neoantigen cancer-vaccine immunogenicity data from primary papers
description: An LLM agent (built on the Claude Agent SDK) that extracts schema-validated, provenance-tracked neoantigen cancer-vaccine immunogenicity data from primary papers (PDF/XLSX/DOCX, including figure-locked tables), with a self-validating repair loop and faithfulness guards. Bring-your-own-key; output is silver (for curator review). The open-source extraction engine behind the NeoVax Atlas.
